text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text:
вА¶вА¶пЉБ 
вАФвАФвАФвАФвА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text:
Wah, Trainer-san! 
вА¶вА¶No, I was just about to leave.

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text:
Thanks again for the training today. 
I'm looking forward to tomorrow too!

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Then, see youпљЮ!!

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text: вАФвАФгАОDear CesarioгАП

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text:
гАОIt's been starting to get warmer here, how about over there? 
During our last day off, Team <Ascella> went flower viewing!гАП

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text:
вАФвАФгАОAnd photos, I'm sending you a lot of them again! 
And surprise! The ever popular puppy series makes a return!гАП

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text:
AlrightвЩ™ Now to attach the photosпљЮ 
вА¶вА¶Ah.

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text: (This one, I took earlier this eveningвАФвАФ)

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶No matter how many times I look, it reallyвА¶вА¶looks the same.

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text: Nothing was capturedвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text: One, two, threeeeeeвА¶вА¶! Huu, allllпљЮrightвА¶вА¶!

вА¶вА¶Alright, it's about time to start training. 
Team <Ascella>, let's begin!

вА¶вА¶Alright, it's about time to start training. 
Team <Ascella>, let's begin!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Okay, Team <Ascella>! 
We're starting training now. Gather up!

text_block_list.name: Antenna-haired Trainee
text_block_list.text:
HeeereпљЮ number one is hereпљЮ. 
вА¶вА¶FuwaahвА¶вА¶just a little sleep deprivedпљЮвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Single Knot Trainee
text_block_list.text:
Stupid, are you stupid!? It's good to be honest though!! 
вА¶вА¶Oh, uh, I'm ready to go too!

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text:
Rhein Kraft, ready to go! 
Motivated, and fully charged.

YeaahпљЮ! 
Me tooпљЮ, fully chargedпљЮпљЮпљЮвШЖ

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶Eh?

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶Huh?

text_block_list.name: <Ascella> Members
text_block_list.text: Who!?!?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: FuufuufuuпљЮвА¶вА¶ EeheheheheheпљЮпљЮпљЮ!!

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Ever since birth, a suuuuuper geniusпљЮ! 
An Uma Musume brighter and sparklier than any before or afterвЩ™

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: That's meвАФвАФFusaichi PandoraвЩ°

text_block_list.name: Pandora's Mom
text_block_list.text:
LookпљЮ, Pan-chan, a brand new One-Piece! 
You said you were wanting one right? Mama found a really lovely oneпљЮ!

text_block_list.name: Pandora's Dad
text_block_list.text:
And from Papa, a brand new pair of shoes! You really 
wanted one with ribbons didn't you? Ah, next time 
let's go find a perfect pair of socks to go with themпљЮ!

text_block_list.name: Young Pandora
text_block_list.text:
вАФвАФAmazingпљЮ! Races seem like lots of funпљЮ! 
Hey, hey, I want to try too! Let me, let meпљЮвЩ°

text_block_list.name: Pandora's Dad
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see, so Pan-chan wants to try racing, huhпљЮ! 
Alright, let's find a club tomorrow! Or even right now!

text_block_list.name: Young Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Haa, haa, haaвА¶вА¶Hehe, goal!! 
I was number oneвЩ™

text_block_list.name: Club Trainer
text_block_list.text:
A time like this at that ageвА¶вА¶! She has some amazing potential! 
Fusaichi PandoraвА¶вА¶You really are what can be called a genius!

text_block_list.name: Young Pandora
text_block_list.text: вА¶вА¶! GeniusвА¶вА¶вЩ°

text_block_list.name: Pandora's Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Uwaaah, it really is Tracen Academy's uniformвА¶вА¶! 
So awesome! I heard the entrance exams are really 
hard, but you passed with flying colors didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Pandora's Friend B
text_block_list.text:
No way!! If it's Pandora-chan then her debut 
and even G1's seem like they'd be easy winsпљЮ!!

text_block_list.name: Young Pandora
text_block_list.text:
EhпљЮ? EheheвА¶вА¶ EheheheheeпљЮ, I wonder? 
MaybeвЩ° After allвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: I'm a genius, you knowвЩ™

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Know what else? Even in the Twinkle Series, if 
anyone was going to do something suuuuuperпљЮ amazing 
that nobody else in history has done beforeвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: Don't you think it has to be me, me, meeeeeпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ!?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
And so! It's the super amazing, super lovely 
Team <Ascella> Newcomer, Fusaichi PandoraвЩ°

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Glad to be here with you!! 
EspeciallyпљЮвА¶вА¶Ku-chan-senpaiвЩ°

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text:
Ah, eh, Pandora-sanвА¶вА¶!? 
Wait, senpai!? вА¶вА¶Eeeeeeh!?

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text: Eh, ah, well! Rather than know herвАФвАФ

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Stop right there, PandoraгГЉгГЉгГЉ!! 
What the hell are you doing!?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: Pyaa!?

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I'm really sorry about that, Team <Ascella>. 
ThatвА¶вА¶our Fusaichi Pandora was causing trouble.

But, I see. Fusaichi Pandora transferring to our team 
was already something you all came to an agreement on.

text_block_list.name: Team Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and tomorrow, we were planning to formally speak to you about itвА¶вА¶ 
But the girl in question was getting a little ahead of herself.

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: HauвА¶вА¶I'm showwyпљЮвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
AhahaвА¶вА¶sorry that things turned out like this. 
But, <Ascella>, can we ask you to still think about it?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
About Fusaichi Pandora. Please, consider it. 
вА¶вА¶Now, you can properly say it too right, Pandora?

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
O-osu! вА¶вА¶Um, well. I'm not doing this on a whim! 
I've really thought about it and decided to change teams!

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
With Ku-chan-senpaiвАФвАФ 
Because I want to run together with Rhein Kraft-chan!

text_block_list.name: Rhein Kraft
text_block_list.text: ! M-meвА¶вА¶?
